title: full Hebrew language support
excerpt:

posts.author: AB-LAW (Avi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear Monday.com Team,

As a proud Israeli business owner and one of thousands of potential Israeli customers, I’m writing to express my deep disappointment regarding the lack of full Hebrew language support in your platform.

It’s particularly surprising that Monday.com - a product developed in Israel by Israelis - doesn’t fully support Hebrew. This creates a significant disconnect with your home market and target audience. The current partial Hebrew support is insufficient for the following reasons:

  1. Israel has a thriving tech and startup ecosystem with thousands of small to medium-sized businesses that need project management tools
  2. Many Israeli teams work primarily or exclusively in Hebrew
  3. Right-to-left language support is crucial for proper workflow and user experience

The demand for Monday.com in Israel is enormous, but this language barrier is driving potential customers to competitors who offer full Hebrew support. I’ve personally spoken with numerous business owners who express the same frustration - they want to support a local Israeli success story but cannot justify using a platform that doesn’t fully support their language needs.

Your team has built an incredible product that we’re eager to use and promote within our business community. By implementing full Hebrew interface support, you would:

  • Dramatically increase adoption in the Israeli market
  • Show commitment to your roots and local user base
  • Gain passionate advocates who would promote your platform throughout Israel

I understand development priorities must be balanced, but this particular feature would generate immediate ROI through increased adoption in your home market.

Please consider prioritizing full Hebrew language support in your upcoming development cycle. It would mean so much to your Israeli user community.

Thank you for considering this request.
